display_name: 霍格沃茨开家长会 Cast

en.name: Lin Xiaozhou
en.summary: Magic student caught between school rules and family questions.

en.name: Lin's Mother
en.summary: Non-magical parent asking plain questions the school usually avoids.

en.name: Grey Parent
en.summary: Pure-blood family representative defending the old order.

en.name: Professor Ada
en.summary: Charms professor trying to explain safety without sounding evasive.

en.name: Professor Byrne
en.summary: Potions professor more comfortable with rules than reassurance.

en.name: Trustee Rowell
en.summary: School trustee watching the meeting for political leverage.

en.name: Madam Maeve
en.summary: School healer focused on what injuries say about policy.

en.name: Nora the Student Reporter
en.summary: Student reporter looking for the quote adults wish they had not given.

en.name: Parent Meeting Host
en.summary: Administrator trying to keep the room from splitting into camps.

en.name: David the Muggle Father
en.summary: Ordinary father comparing magic-school risk to ordinary common sense.

en.name: Ewan the Pure-Blood Student
en.summary: Student repeating family certainty until classmates push back.

en.name: Mira the Club President
en.summary: Student organizer trying to make parent access less symbolic.

en.name: Owl Keeper
en.summary: Back-office staffer who knows how school logistics actually work.

en.name: Portrait Gatekeeper
en.summary: Old portrait defending tradition because that is all it has left.
